element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Basic melee combat against humanoid enemies
Thematic enemy type in nautical setting

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Slow action with prolonged enemy encounters; battles described as endless due to high enemy durability

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory combat against security guards in Fun World theme park setting
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalation to mascot battles; player must adapt to larger adversary types
difficulty_curve.late_game: Pirate ship, haunted house, and the pits stages with thematic enemy variety
notable_spikes: Pirate ship stage introduces nautical themed enemies
The pits described as climactic arena

notable_level_patterns.description: Game progresses through thematically distinct areas of Fun World theme park (haunted house, pirate ship, pits)
Different enemy archetypes (guards, mascots, pirates) inhabit thematic zones
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Pirate ship stage with pirate enemies

notable_level_patterns.description: Side-scrolling beat-em-up structure with linear progression through Fun World
